description.en: Installation of Christmas lights in Broseley town center to enhance the environment for residents during Christmas.

aiReasoning.en: Maintenance is explicitly listed as part of the service required.

description.en: Dismantling and removal of Christmas lights after the festive period.

description.en: Contractor must comply with all relevant health and safety legislation.

description.en: Measures must be taken to minimize any risk to the public, e.g., tools not left on pavement, vehicles parked without obstruction.
description.de: Es müssen Maßnahmen ergriffen werden, um jegliches Risiko für die Öffentlichkeit zu minimieren, z.B. Werkzeuge nicht auf dem Gehweg liegen lassen, Fahrzeuge ohne Behinderung parken.

aiReasoning.en: Explicitly stated as a requirement under 'CONTRACT HEALTH & SAFETY'.

description.en: Erection, testing and maintenance must be carried out in accordance with the latest Wiring Regulations (BS 7671) by a competent person.
description.de: Aufstellung, Prüfung und Wartung müssen gemäß den neuesten Wiring Regulations (BS 7671) durch eine befugte Person erfolgen.

aiReasoning.en: Explicitly stated as a requirement under 'CONTRACT HEALTH & SAFETY'.

description.en: Successful contractor must produce a Health & Safety Information prior to installation, including Risk Assessment and Method Statement.

aiReasoning.en: Explicitly stated as a requirement under 'CONTRACT HEALTH & SAFETY'.

description.en: Two scheduled run-throughs of the display to check functionality and attend to minor faults.

description.en: The following procedure must be followed when submitting quotations: All invitations to tender are subject to the Town Council's Standing Order number 17 and the terms of the Bribery Act 2010. No contractor shall contact councillors or staff to encourage or support their tender outside the prescribed process. Tenders are to be submitted in writing in a sealed marked envelope addressed to the Town Clerk. The envelope should be clearly marked 'Tender'. Tenders shall be opened by the Town Clerk in the presence of at least two councillors after the deadline for submission of tenders has passed. Tenders will be reported to and considered by the Town Council at a properly convened meeting.
description.de: Entfernung aller Lichter

aiReasoning.en: Listed as a requirement, implies end-of-season removal.

deliverableArray.bulletPoint: 02 Call out within 24 hours for major faults

description.en: Call out within 24 hours for major faults including complete failure of a motif or light string, extreme damage from vandalism, storms, or road traffic accident.
description.de: Bereitschaftsdienst innerhalb von 24 Stunden bei schwerwiegenden Störungen, einschließlich Totalausfall eines Motivs oder einer Lichterkette, extremer Schäden durch Vandalismus, Stürme oder Verkehrsunfälle.

description.en: All anchor points must be tested.
description.de: Alle Ankerpunkte müssen getestet werden.

description.en: Lights are to be dismantled and removed as soon as possible after 6 January each year, but no later than 12 January.
description.de: Die Lichter sind so bald wie möglich nach dem 6. Januar jedes Jahres, spätestens jedoch bis zum 12. Januar, abzubauen und zu entfernen.

aiReasoning.en: The text uses 'are to be' and 'no later than', indicating a mandatory requirement.

description.en: All lights and features are to be tested during downtime and any minor work such as replacing bulbs and fixing faulty connections is to be undertaken.
description.de: Alle Lichter und Funktionen sind während der Ausfallzeit zu testen, und kleinere Arbeiten wie der Austausch von Glühbirnen und die Behebung fehlerhafter Verbindungen sind durchzuführen.

aiReasoning.en: The text uses 'are to be' and 'is to be undertaken', indicating mandatory requirements.

description.en: All lights and features must be fully functioning prior to installation.
description.de: Alle Lichter und Funktionen müssen vor der Installation voll funktionsfähig sein.

aiReasoning.en: The text uses 'must', indicating a mandatory requirement.

description.en: The contractor will notify BTC immediately of any defective lights and features that require major repair at additional cost or that cannot be repaired so replacement can be considered in good time.
description.de: Der Auftragnehmer wird BTC unverzüglich über defekte Lichter und Funktionen informieren, die eine größere Reparatur zu zusätzlichen Kosten erfordern oder nicht repariert werden können, damit ein Ersatz rechtzeitig in Betracht gezogen werden kann.

aiReasoning.en: The text uses 'will notify', which in context is a contractual obligation.

description.en: All items must be costed individually.
